positional.h(3) Library Functions Manual positional.h(3)

NAME

positional.h - POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section generator for man pages.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


char * manpage_content_generate_positional (const options_config_t *config)
Generate POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section content. void manpage_content_free_positional (char *content)
Free generated positional content.

Detailed Description

POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section generator for man pages.

Generates the POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section from positional argument descriptors showing what arguments a program accepts.

Definition in file positional.h.

Function Documentation

void manpage_content_free_positional (char * content)

Free generated positional content.

Parameters

content Content to free (can be NULL)

Definition at line 74 of file positional.c.

74                                                     {
75   if (content) {
76     SAFE_FREE(content);
77   }
78 }




References SAFE_FREE.


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().






char
  * manpage_content_generate_positional (const options_config_t *
  config)


Generate POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section content. Creates POSITIONAL
    ARGUMENTS section from positional argument descriptors with proper groff
    formatting and examples.




Parameters


Config Module Options
  configuration with positional descriptors


Returns


Newly allocated content string (caller must free)


Definition at line 15 of file positional.c.


15                                                                           {
16   if (!config) {
17     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(1, char *);
18     buffer[0] = '\0';
19     return buffer;
20   }
21 
22   if (config->num_positional_args == 0) {
23     // Generate fallback content when no positional arguments are defined
24     size_t buffer_capacity = 256;
25     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
26     size_t offset = 0;
27     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\nNo positional arguments for this mode.\n");
28     log_debug("Generated POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section (fallback - no args found)");
29     return buffer;
30   }
31 
32   // Allocate growing buffer for positional section
33   size_t buffer_capacity = 4096;
34   char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
35   size_t offset = 0;
36 
37   for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_positional_args; i++) {
38     const positional_arg_descriptor_t *pos_arg = &config->positional_args[i];
39 
40     // Ensure buffer is large enough
41     if (offset + 512 >= buffer_capacity) {
42       buffer_capacity *= 2;
43       buffer = SAFE_REALLOC(buffer, buffer_capacity, char *);
44     }
45 
46     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".TP\n");
47     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B %s\n", pos_arg->name);
48 
49     if (pos_arg->help_text) {
50       offset +=
51           safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s\n", escape_groff_special(pos_arg->help_text));
52     }
53 
54     // Add examples if present
55     if (pos_arg->num_examples > 0) {
56       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".RS\n");
57       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B Examples:\n");
58       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".RS\n");
59       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".nf\n");
60       for (size_t j = 0; j < pos_arg->num_examples; j++) {
61         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s\n",
62                                 escape_groff_special(pos_arg->examples[j]));
63       }
64       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".fi\n");
65       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".RE\n");
66       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".RE\n");
67     }
68   }
69 
70   log_debug("Generated POSITIONAL ARGUMENTS section (%zu bytes)", offset);
71   return buffer;
72 }






References escape_groff_special(),
    positional_arg_descriptor_t::examples,
    positional_arg_descriptor_t::help_text, log_debug,
    positional_arg_descriptor_t::name,
    positional_arg_descriptor_t::num_examples,
    options_config_t::num_positional_args,
    options_config_t::positional_args, SAFE_MALLOC,
    SAFE_REALLOC, and safe_snprintf().


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().
